title: DALL·E now available in beta
summary: We’ll invite 1 million people from our waitlist over the coming weeks. Users can create with DALL·E using free credits that refill every month, and buy additional credits in 115-generation increments for $15.
summaryZh: 在接下来的几周内，我们将邀请候补名单中的100万人。用户可以使用每月补充的免费积分与DALL · E一起创建，并以$ 15的价格以115代增量购买额外的积分。
highlights: We’ll invite 1 million people from our waitlist over the coming weeks.
Users can create with DALL·E using free credits that refill every month, and buy additional credits in 115-generation increments for $15.
highlightsZh: 在接下来的几周内，我们将邀请候补名单中的100万人。用户可以使用每月补充的免费积分与DALL · E一起创建，并以$ 15的价格以115代增量购买额外的积分。

title: Reducing bias and improving safety in DALL·E 2
titleZh: 减少偏差并提高DALL · E 2的安全性
summary: Today, we are implementing a new technique so that DALL·E generates images of people that more accurately reflect the diversity of the world’s population.
summaryZh: 今天，我们正在实施一种新技术，以便DALL · E生成更准确地反映世界人口多样性的人物图像。
highlights: Today, we are implementing a new technique so that DALL·E generates images of people that more accurately reflect the diversity of the world’s population.
highlightsZh: 今天，我们正在实施一种新技术，以便DALL · E生成更准确地反映世界人口多样性的人物图像。

title: DALL·E 2: Extending creativity
summary: As part of our DALL·E 2 research preview, more than 3,000 artists from more than 118 countries have incorporated DALL·E into their creative workflows. The artists in our early access group have helped us discover new uses for DALL·E and have served as key voices as we’ve made decisions about DALL·E’s features.
summaryZh: 作为我们DALL · E 2研究预览的一部分，来自118多个国家的3,000多位艺术家将DALL · E融入了他们的创意工作流程中。抢先体验组中的艺术家帮助我们发现了DALL · E的新用途，并在我们就DALL · E的功能做出决定时发挥了关键作用。
highlights: As part of our DALL·E 2 research preview, more than 3,000 artists from more than 118 countries have incorporated DALL·E into their creative workflows.
The artists in our early access group have helped us discover new uses for DALL·E and have served as key voices as we’ve made decisions about DALL·E’s features.
highlightsZh: 作为我们DALL · E 2研究预览的一部分，来自118多个国家的3,000多位艺术家将DALL · E融入了他们的创意工作流程中。抢先体验组中的艺术家帮助我们发现了DALL · E的新用途，并在我们就DALL · E的功能做出决定时发挥了关键作用。
